lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸਬਦਿ ਮਿਲੈ ਭਉ ਭੰਜਨੁ ਹਰਿ ਰਾਵੈ ਮਸਤਕਿ ਭਾਗੋ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: naanak sabad milai bhau bhanjan har raavai masatak bhaago |3|
lines.english: O Nanak, through the Shabad, one meets the Lord, the Destroyer of fear, and by the destiny written on her forehead, she enjoys Him. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਖੇਤੀ ਵਣਜੁ ਸਭੁ ਹੁਕਮੁ ਹੈ ਹੁਕਮੇ ਮੰਨਿ ਵਡਿਆਈ ਰਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: khetee vanaj sabh hukam hai hukame man vaddiaaee raam |
lines.english: All farming and trading is by Hukam of His Will; surrendering to the Lord's Will, glorious greatness is obtained.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੁਕਮਿ ਮਿਲਾਈ ਸਹਜਿ ਸਮਾਈ ਗੁਰ ਕਾ ਸਬਦੁ ਅਪਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: hukam milaaee sehaj samaaee gur kaa sabad apaaraa |
lines.english: By His Will, one merges and easily blends with Him. The Shabads of the Guru are incomparable.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮਤੀ ਹੁਕਮੁ ਬੂਝੀਐ ਹੁਕਮੇ ਮੇਲਿ ਮਿਲਾਈ ਰਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: guramatee hukam boojheeai hukame mel milaaee raam |
lines.english: Under Guru's Instruction, one comes to understand the Lord's Will, and by His Will, he is united in His Union.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੀ ਵਡਿਆਈ ਗੁਰ ਤੇ ਪਾਈ ਸਚੁ ਸਵਾਰਣਹਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: sachee vaddiaaee gur te paaee sach savaaranahaaraa |
lines.english: Through the Guru, true greatness is obtained, and one is embellished with Truth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਉ ਭੰਜਨੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਆਪੁ ਗਵਾਇਆ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਮੇਲਿ ਮਿਲਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: bhau bhanjan paaeaa aap gavaaeaa guramukh mel milaaee |
lines.english: He finds the Destroyer of fear, and eradicates his self-conceit; as Gurmukh, he is united in His Union.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮੁ ਨਿਰੰਜਨੁ ਅਗਮੁ ਅਗੋਚਰੁ ਹੁਕਮੇ ਰਹਿਆ ਸਮਾਈ ॥੪॥੨॥
lines.translit: kahu naanak naam niranjan agam agochar hukame rahiaa samaaee |4|2|
lines.english: Says Nanak, the Name of the immaculate, inaccessible, unfathomable Commander is permeating and pervading everywhere. ||4||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਮੇਰਿਆ ਤੂ ਸਦਾ ਸਚੁ ਸਮਾਲਿ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: man meriaa too sadaa sach samaal jeeo |
lines.english: O my mind, contemplate the True Lord forever.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਣੈ ਘਰਿ ਤੂ ਸੁਖਿ ਵਸਹਿ ਪੋਹਿ ਨ ਸਕੈ ਜਮਕਾਲੁ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: aapanai ghar too sukh vaseh pohi na sakai jamakaal jeeo |
lines.english: Dwell in peace in the home of your own self, and the Messenger of Death shall not touch you.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਡਹੰਸੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: vaddahans mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Wadahans, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਦਾ ਸਚਿ ਰਤਾ ਮਨੁ ਨਿਰਮਲੁ ਆਵਣੁ ਜਾਣੁ ਰਹਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: sadaa sach rataa man niramal aavan jaan rahaae |
lines.english: Ever imbued with the True Lord, the mind becomes immaculate, and its coming and going is ended.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਲੁ ਜਾਲੁ ਜਮੁ ਜੋਹਿ ਨ ਸਾਕੈ ਸਾਚੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: kaal jaal jam johi na saakai saachai sabad liv laae |
lines.english: The noose of the Messenger of Death shall not touch you, when you embrace love for the True Word of the Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੂਜੈ ਭਾਇ ਭਰਮਿ ਵਿਗੁਤੀ ਮਨਮੁਖਿ ਮੋਹੀ ਜਮਕਾਲਿ ॥
lines.translit: doojai bhaae bharam vigutee manamukh mohee jamakaal |
lines.english: The love of duality and doubt have ruined the self-willed manmukh, who is lured away by the Messenger of Death.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹੈ ਨਾਨਕੁ ਸੁਣਿ ਮਨ ਮੇਰੇ ਤੂ ਸਦਾ ਸਚੁ ਸਮਾਲਿ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: kahai naanak sun man mere too sadaa sach samaal |1|
lines.english: Says Nanak, listen, O my mind: contemplate the True Lord forever. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਮੇਰਿਆ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਤੇਰੈ ਨਿਧਾਨੁ ਹੈ ਬਾਹਰਿ ਵਸਤੁ ਨ ਭਾਲਿ ॥
lines.translit: man meriaa antar terai nidhaan hai baahar vasat na bhaal |
lines.english: O my mind, the treasure is within you; do not search for it on the outside.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਨਦਰਿ ਨਿਹਾਲਿ ਮਨ ਮੇਰੇ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਸਖਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh nadar nihaal man mere antar har naam sakhaaee |
lines.english: As Gurmukh, receive the blessing of His Glance of Grace, O my mind; the Name of the Lord, your help and support, is within you.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਭਾਵੈ ਸੋ ਭੁੰਚਿ ਤੂ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਨਦਰਿ ਨਿਹਾਲਿ ॥
lines.translit: jo bhaavai so bhunch too guramukh nadar nihaal |
lines.english: Eat only that which is pleasing to the Lord, and as Gurmukh, receive the blessing of His Glance of Grace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖ ਅੰਧੁਲੇ ਗਿਆਨ ਵਿਹੂਣੇ ਦੂਜੈ ਭਾਇ ਖੁਆਈ ॥
lines.translit: manamukh andhule giaan vihoone doojai bhaae khuaaee |
lines.english: The self-willed manmukhs are blind, and devoid of wisdom; they are ruined by the love of duality.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਨਾਵੈ ਕੋ ਛੂਟੈ ਨਾਹੀ ਸਭ ਬਾਧੀ ਜਮਕਾਲਿ ॥
lines.translit: bin naavai ko chhoottai naahee sabh baadhee jamakaal |
lines.english: Without the Name, no one is emancipated. All are bound by the Messenger of Death.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਮੇਰਿਆ ਜਨਮੁ ਪਦਾਰਥੁ ਪਾਇ ਕੈ ਇਕਿ ਸਚਿ ਲਗੇ ਵਾਪਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: man meriaa janam padaarath paae kai ik sach lage vaapaaraa |
lines.english: O my mind, obtaining the blessing of this human birth, some are engaged in the trade of Truth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਤੇਰੈ ਨਿਧਾਨੁ ਹੈ ਤੂ ਬਾਹਰਿ ਵਸਤੁ ਨ ਭਾਲਿ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak antar terai nidhaan hai too baahar vasat na bhaal |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, the treasure is within you; do not search for it on the outside. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਸੇਵਨਿ ਆਪਣਾ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਸਬਦੁ ਅਪਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: satigur sevan aapanaa antar sabad apaaraa |
lines.english: They serve their True Guru, and the Infinite Word of the Shabad resounds within them.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤਰਿ ਸਬਦੁ ਅਪਾਰਾ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਪਿਆਰਾ ਨਾਮੇ ਨਉ ਨਿਧਿ ਪਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: antar sabad apaaraa har naam piaaraa naame nau nidh paaee |
lines.english: Within them is the Infinite Shabad, and the Beloved Naam, the Name of the Lord; through the Naam, the nine treasures are obtained.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖ ਮਾਇਆ ਮੋਹ ਵਿਆਪੇ ਦੂਖਿ ਸੰਤਾਪੇ ਦੂਜੈ ਪਤਿ ਗਵਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: manamukh maaeaa moh viaape dookh santaape doojai pat gavaaee |
lines.english: The self-willed manmukhs are engrossed in emotional attachment to Maya; they suffer in pain, and through duality, they lose their honor.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉਮੈ ਮਾਰਿ ਸਚਿ ਸਬਦਿ ਸਮਾਣੇ ਸਚਿ ਰਤੇ ਅਧਿਕਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: haumai maar sach sabad samaane sach rate adhikaaee |
lines.english: But those who conquer their ego, and merge in the True Shabad, are totally imbued with Truth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਮਾਣਸ ਜਨਮੁ ਦੁਲੰਭੁ ਹੈ ਸਤਿਗੁਰਿ ਬੂਝ ਬੁਝਾਈ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: naanak maanas janam dulanbh hai satigur boojh bujhaaee |3|
lines.english: O Nanak, it is so difficult to obtain this human life; the True Guru imparts this understanding. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਮਨੁ ਮਾਰਹਿ ਆਪਣਾ ਸੇ ਪੁਰਖ ਬੈਰਾਗੀ ਰਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: jo man maareh aapanaa se purakh bairaagee raam |
lines.english: Those who conquer their minds are beings of renunciation and detachment.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਮੇਰੇ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਸੇਵਨਿ ਆਪਣਾ ਸੇ ਜਨ ਵਡਭਾਗੀ ਰਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: man mere satigur sevan aapanaa se jan vaddabhaagee raam |
lines.english: O my mind, those who serve their True Guru are the most fortunate beings.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੇ ਜਨ ਬੈਰਾਗੀ ਸਚਿ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਗੀ ਆਪਣਾ ਆਪੁ ਪਛਾਣਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: se jan bairaagee sach liv laagee aapanaa aap pachhaaniaa |
lines.english: They are beings of renunciation and detachment, who lovingly focus their consciousness on the True Lord; they realize and understand their own selves.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਤਿ ਨਿਹਚਲ ਅਤਿ ਗੂੜੀ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਸਹਜੇ ਨਾਮੁ ਵਖਾਣਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: mat nihachal at goorree guramukh sahaje naam vakhaaniaa |
lines.english: Their intellect is steady, deep and profound; as Gurmukh, they naturally chant the Naam, the Name of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕ ਕਾਮਣਿ ਹਿਤਕਾਰੀ ਮਾਇਆ ਮੋਹਿ ਪਿਆਰੀ ਮਨਮੁਖ ਸੋਇ ਰਹੇ ਅਭਾਗੇ ॥
lines.translit: eik kaaman hitakaaree maaeaa mohi piaaree manamukh soe rahe abhaage |
lines.english: Some are lovers of beautiful young women; emotional attachment to Maya is very dear to them. The unfortunate self-willed manmukhs remain asleep.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਡਹੰਸੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: vaddahans mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Wadahans, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਤਨ ਪਦਾਰਥ ਵਣਜੀਅਹਿ ਸਤਿਗੁਰਿ ਦੀਆ ਬੁਝਾਈ ਰਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: ratan padaarath vanajeeeh satigur deea bujhaaee raam |
lines.english: Purchase the jewel, the invaluable treasure; the True Guru has given this understanding.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸਹਜੇ ਸੇਵਹਿ ਗੁਰੁ ਅਪਣਾ ਸੇ ਪੂਰੇ ਵਡਭਾਗੇ ॥੪॥੩॥
lines.translit: naanak sahaje seveh gur apanaa se poore vaddabhaage |4|3|
lines.english: O Nanak, those who intuitively serve their Guru, have perfect destiny. ||4||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਾਹਾ ਲਾਭੁ ਹਰਿ ਭਗਤਿ ਹੈ ਗੁਣ ਮਹਿ ਗੁਣੀ ਸਮਾਈ ਰਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: laahaa laabh har bhagat hai gun meh gunee samaaee raam |
lines.english: The profit of profits is the devotional worship of the Lord; one's virtues merge into the virtues of the Lord.
